---
name: 'bmad-party-mode'
description: 'Orchestrates group discussions between all installed BMAD agents, enabling natural multi-agent conversations'
---

In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: c:\Users\mohsho\.vscode\extensions\mohamed-sayed.bmad-studio-1.0.0\resources\_bmad
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL c:\Users\mohsho\.vscode\extensions\mohamed-sayed.bmad-studio-1.0.0\resources\_bmad/core/workflows/party-mode/workflow.md, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!
